rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Rundll32 Without a Command Line

rules.rule_text:
title: Rundll32 Without a Command Line
id: 0fab2f9d-0c38-4392-802f-09e4f4fef0ed
status: experimental
description: "Rundll32 does not normally execute without corresponding command-line\
  \ \narguments and while spawning a child process. Given this, you may want \nto\
  \ alert on the execution of processes that appear to be rundll32.exe \nwithout any\
  \ command-line arguments , especially when they spawn child \nprocesses or make\
  \ network connections. Part of the RedCanary 2024 \nThreat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rundll32/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218
- attack.t1218.011
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \rundll32.exe
    ParentCommandLine: null
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
